info.title: DataForSEO API
info.description: DataForSEO API endpoints exposed through the AIsa unified gateway.

get.summary: List of Bing Locations for SERP
get.description: List of Bing Locations for SERP. Returns the list of supported locations for Bing SERP. Your account is not charged for using this endpoint.

version.description: The current version of the API

x-doc.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
x-doc.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本，便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

x-doc.desc_en: Top-level status code for the whole API call. `20000` indicates the call was accepted and processed; non-20xxx values signal a request-level failure that applies before any per-task processing.
x-doc.title_zh: 整次 API 调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用被受理并处理成功；非 20xxx 值代表在进入单任务处理之前就发生的请求级失败。

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying `status_code`; read it when `status_code` is not a success value to learn the cause.
x-doc.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时，读取此字段定位原因。

x-doc.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
x-doc.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

x-doc.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD. Reads-only listing endpoints (locations/languages) return 0.
x-doc.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；locations/languages 等只读列表接口返回 0。

tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array

x-doc.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
x-doc.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error

x-doc.desc_en: How many of the entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `status_code`.
x-doc.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

x-doc.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
x-doc.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

x-doc.desc_en: List of locations supported for this search engine's SERP. Use a returned `location_code` (or `location_name`) when posting tasks to target that locale.
x-doc.title_zh: 该搜索引擎 SERP 支持的地区列表。提交任务时用其中的 `location_code`（或 `location_name`）来锁定目标地区。

x-doc.desc_en: Numeric code identifying the location; pass it as the `location_code` request field to geo-target a task.
x-doc.title_zh: 标识地区的数字代码；作为请求字段 `location_code` 传入以对任务做地域定位。

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable full name of the location; corresponds to the `location_name` request field.
x-doc.title_zh: 地区的可读全名；对应请求字段 `location_name`。

x-doc.desc_en: Code of the enclosing (parent) location, e.g. the country a city belongs to; helps build a location hierarchy.
x-doc.title_zh: 上级（父）地区的代码，例如城市所属的国家，可用于构建地区层级。

x-doc.desc_en: ISO 3166-1 country code of the location, e.g. `US`.
x-doc.title_zh: 该地区所属国家的 ISO 3166-1 代码，如 `US`。

x-doc.heading_zh: 查询 Bing 地区列表 get_dataforseo_serp_bing_locations
x-doc.desc_en: List the locations supported for Bing SERP requests; use a returned code or name to geo-target tasks. This endpoint is free.
x-doc.description_zh: 列出 Bing SERP 请求支持的地区；用返回的代码或名称对任务做地域定位。该接口免费。

get.summary: List of Bing Languages for SERP
get.description: List of Bing Languages for SERP. Returns the list of supported languages for Bing SERP. Your account is not charged for using this endpoint.

tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array

x-doc.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
x-doc.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error

x-doc.desc_en: How many of the entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `status_code`.
x-doc.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

x-doc.desc_en: List of languages supported for this search engine's SERP. Use a returned `language_code` (or `language_name`) when posting tasks.
x-doc.title_zh: 该搜索引擎 SERP 支持的语言列表。提交任务时使用其中的 `language_code`（或 `language_name`）。

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable full name of the language; corresponds to the `language_name` request field.
x-doc.title_zh: 语言的可读全名；对应请求字段 `language_name`。

x-doc.desc_en: Code identifying the language; pass it as the `language_code` request field.
x-doc.title_zh: 标识语言的代码；作为请求字段 `language_code` 传入。

x-doc.heading_zh: 查询 Bing 语言列表 get_dataforseo_serp_bing_languages
x-doc.desc_en: List the languages supported for Bing SERP requests; use a returned code or name when posting tasks. This endpoint is free.
x-doc.description_zh: 列出 Bing SERP 请求支持的语言；提交任务时使用返回的代码或名称。该接口免费。

post.description: Setting Bing Organic SERP Tasks. Your account is charged only for setting a task. You can send up to 100 tasks per POST call and retrieve completed results later by task id or via postback/pingback.

version.description: The current version of the API

x-doc.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
x-doc.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本，便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array

x-doc.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
x-doc.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error

x-doc.desc_en: How many of the entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `status_code`.
x-doc.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

x-doc.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
x-doc.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

x-doc.desc_en: UUID of this task. Pass it to the matching `task_get` endpoint to collect results later, and reuse it as `task_id` for the AI Summary and Screenshot endpoints.
x-doc.title_zh: 该任务的 UUID。稍后用它调用对应的 `task_get` 接口取回结果，也可作为 `task_id` 复用于 AI Summary 与 Screenshot 接口。

x-doc.desc_en: Per-task status code. `20000` means done; `20100` typically means the task was accepted and is still being processed.
x-doc.title_zh: 单任务状态码。`20000` 表示已完成；`20100` 通常表示任务已受理、仍在处理中。

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.
x-doc.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明；当任务状态码非成功值时据此排查。

x-doc.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
x-doc.title_zh: 该单任务的扣费金额，单位为美元。

tasks[].result_count.description: Number of elements in the result array

x-doc.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's `result` array.
x-doc.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的条目数量。

x-doc.desc_en: Search query to run on the search engine, exactly as a user would type it. This is the only required field for keyword-based endpoints.
x-doc.title_zh: 要在搜索引擎上执行的查询词，按用户实际输入的样子填写；关键词类接口中这是唯一必填字段。

location_name.description: Full name of search engine location

x-doc.desc_en: Full location name to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_code`.
x-doc.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的地区全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_code` 二选一提供。

x-doc.desc_en: Numeric location code to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_name`.
x-doc.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的数字地区代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_name` 二选一提供。

language_name.description: Full name of search engine language

x-doc.desc_en: Full language name for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_code`.
x-doc.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_code` 二选一提供。

x-doc.desc_en: Language code for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_name`.
x-doc.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_name` 二选一提供。

x-doc.desc_en: Device profile to emulate for the search, which can change how results are ranked and rendered.
x-doc.title_zh: 搜索时模拟的设备类型，会影响结果的排序与呈现方式。

x-doc.desc_en: Operating system to emulate together with `device`.
x-doc.title_zh: 与 `device` 搭配模拟的操作系统。

x-doc.desc_en: How many SERP results to parse; higher values return more results and may affect task cost.
x-doc.title_zh: 解析的 SERP 结果条数；值越大返回结果越多，并可能影响任务费用。

x-doc.desc_en: Execution priority of the queued task; a higher priority makes the task run sooner and may cost more.
x-doc.title_zh: 排队任务的执行优先级；优先级越高任务越早执行，费用可能更高。

x-doc.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO calls with the task result once it is ready, so you do not have to poll.
x-doc.title_zh: 任务完成后由 DataForSEO 主动回推结果的你方接收地址，从而无需轮询。

pingback_url.description: Notification URL of a completed task

x-doc.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO pings to notify that the task is complete (without the payload); you then collect results via `task_get`.
x-doc.title_zh: 任务完成时由 DataForSEO 回调通知（不含结果数据）的你方地址；收到通知后再用 `task_get` 领取结果。

postback_data.description: Postback datatype; possible values: regular, advanced, html

x-doc.desc_en: Result format to deliver to `postback_url`; choose the result type that matches how you will consume the data.
x-doc.title_zh: 回推到 `postback_url` 的结果格式；选择与你消费方式相匹配的结果类型。

x-doc.heading_zh: 提交 Bing 自然搜索任务 post_dataforseo_serp_bing_organic_task_post
x-doc.desc_en: Queue an organic SERP task for Bing; you are charged only for posting, can send up to 100 tasks per call, and collect results later by task id or via postback/pingback.
x-doc.description_zh: 提交 Bing 自然搜索 SERP 任务；仅在提交时计费，每次调用最多 100 个任务，稍后按任务 id 或通过 postback/pingback 领取结果。

get.summary: Get Organic SERP Completed Tasks
get.description: Get Organic SERP Completed Tasks. Returns completed Bing Organic SERP tasks that have not been collected yet.

x-doc.desc_en: List of completed-but-uncollected tasks. Each entry exposes the URLs to fetch its results.
x-doc.title_zh: 已完成但尚未领取的任务列表；每个条目给出领取结果的 URL。

tasks[].result[].id.description: Task identifier of the completed task

x-doc.desc_en: UUID of a completed task ready for collection; feed it to the matching `task_get` endpoint.
x-doc.title_zh: 可领取的已完成任务的 UUID；传给对应的 `task_get` 接口。

x-doc.desc_en: Relative API path for collecting this task's regular results.
x-doc.title_zh: 领取该任务 regular 结果的相对 API 路径。

x-doc.desc_en: Relative API path for collecting this task's advanced results.
x-doc.title_zh: 领取该任务 advanced 结果的相对 API 路径。

x-doc.desc_en: Relative API path for collecting this task's HTML results.
x-doc.title_zh: 领取该任务 HTML 结果的相对 API 路径。

x-doc.heading_zh: 查询 Bing 已完成待领取任务 get_dataforseo_serp_bing_organic_tasks_ready
x-doc.desc_en: List Bing tasks that have finished but have not yet been collected, with the URLs to fetch each result.
x-doc.description_zh: 列出 Bing 已完成但尚未领取的任务，并给出领取各结果的 URL。

get.summary: Get Bing Organic SERP Results by id（regular）
get.description: Get Bing Organic SERP Results by id (regular). Returns regular SERP results for a previously posted Bing Organic task.

x-doc.desc_en: UUID of the task to collect, as returned in `tasks[].id` when the task was posted or listed by the matching tasks_ready endpoint.
x-doc.title_zh: 要领取的任务的 UUID；提交任务时由 `tasks[].id` 返回，或可从对应 tasks_ready 接口列出。

x-doc.heading_zh: 领取 Bing 任务结果（regular） get_dataforseo_serp_bing_organic_task_get_regular_id
x-doc.desc_en: Collect the regular results of a previously posted Bing task by its id.
x-doc.description_zh: 按任务 id 领取此前提交的 Bing 任务的 regular 结果。

x-doc.title_zh: 要领取的任务的 UUID；提交任务时由 `tasks[].id` 返回，或可从对应 tasks_ready 接口列出。

x-doc.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
x-doc.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本，便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

x-doc.desc_en: Top-level status code for the whole API call. `20000` indicates the call was accepted and processed; non-20xxx values signal a request-level failure that applies before any per-task processing.
x-doc.title_zh: 整次 API 调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用被受理并处理成功；非 20xxx 值代表在进入单任务处理之前就发生的请求级失败。

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying `status_code`; read it when `status_code` is not a success value to learn the cause.
x-doc.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时，读取此字段定位原因。

x-doc.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
x-doc.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

x-doc.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD. Reads-only listing endpoints (locations/languages) return 0.
x-doc.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；locations/languages 等只读列表接口返回 0。

tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array

x-doc.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
x-doc.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

tasks_error.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error

x-doc.desc_en: How many of the entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `status_code`.
x-doc.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

x-doc.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
x-doc.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

x-doc.desc_en: UUID of this task. Pass it to the matching `task_get` endpoint to collect results later, and reuse it as `task_id` for the AI Summary and Screenshot endpoints.
x-doc.title_zh: 该任务的 UUID。稍后用它调用对应的 `task_get` 接口取回结果，也可作为 `task_id` 复用于 AI Summary 与 Screenshot 接口。

x-doc.desc_en: Per-task status code. `20000` means done; `20100` typically means the task was accepted and is still being processed.
x-doc.title_zh: 单任务状态码。`20000` 表示已完成；`20100` 通常表示任务已受理、仍在处理中。

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.
x-doc.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明；当任务状态码非成功值时据此排查。

x-doc.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
x-doc.title_zh: 该单任务的扣费金额，单位为美元。

tasks[].result_count.description: Number of elements in the result array

x-doc.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's `result` array.
x-doc.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的条目数量。

x-doc.desc_en: Search query to run on the search engine, exactly as a user would type it. This is the only required field for keyword-based endpoints.
x-doc.title_zh: 要在搜索引擎上执行的查询词，按用户实际输入的样子填写；关键词类接口中这是唯一必填字段。

location_name.description: Full name of search engine location

x-doc.desc_en: Full location name to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_code`.
x-doc.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的地区全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_code` 二选一提供。

x-doc.desc_en: Numeric location code to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_name`.
x-doc.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的数字地区代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_name` 二选一提供。

language_name.description: Full name of search engine language

x-doc.desc_en: Full language name for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_code`.
x-doc.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_code` 二选一提供。

x-doc.desc_en: Language code for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_name`.
x-doc.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_name` 二选一提供。

x-doc.desc_en: Device profile to emulate for the search, which can change how results are ranked and rendered.
x-doc.title_zh: 搜索时模拟的设备类型，会影响结果的排序与呈现方式。

x-doc.desc_en: Operating system to emulate together with `device`.
x-doc.title_zh: 与 `device` 搭配模拟的操作系统。

x-doc.desc_en: How many SERP results to parse; higher values return more results and may affect task cost.
x-doc.title_zh: 解析的 SERP 结果条数；值越大返回结果越多，并可能影响任务费用。

x-doc.desc_en: Execution priority of the queued task; a higher priority makes the task run sooner and may cost more.
x-doc.title_zh: 排队任务的执行优先级；优先级越高任务越早执行，费用可能更高。

x-doc.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO calls with the task result once it is ready, so you do not have to poll.
x-doc.title_zh: 任务完成后由 DataForSEO 主动回推结果的你方接收地址，从而无需轮询。

pingback_url.description: Notification URL of a completed task

x-doc.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO pings to notify that the task is complete (without the payload); you then collect results via `task_get`.
x-doc.title_zh: 任务完成时由 DataForSEO 回调通知（不含结果数据）的你方地址；收到通知后再用 `task_get` 领取结果。

postback_data.description: Postback datatype; possible values: regular, advanced, html

x-doc.desc_en: Result format to deliver to `postback_url`; choose the result type that matches how you will consume the data.
x-doc.title_zh: 回推到 `postback_url` 的结果格式；选择与你消费方式相匹配的结果类型。

x-doc.heading_zh: 提交 百度 自然搜索任务 post_dataforseo_serp_baidu_organic_task_post
x-doc.desc_en: Queue an organic SERP task for Baidu; you are charged only for posting, can send up to 100 tasks per call, and collect results later by task id or via postback/pingback.
x-doc.description_zh: 提交 百度 自然搜索 SERP 任务；仅在提交时计费，每次调用最多 100 个任务，稍后按任务 id 或通过 postback/pingback 领取结果。
